name: SOC Shift Handoff Report
description: Generates a comprehensive shift handoff report for SOC team transitions. A code node gathers all open investigations and their current statuses, then Riggs AI produces an executive summary covering open investigations, pending actions, escalated incidents, and items needing attention for the incoming shift. The report is distributed via email to the incoming shift and posted to the SOC Slack channel.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Post shift handoff summary to the SOC operations channel

config.description: Manually triggered at the end of a shift to generate the handoff report for the incoming team

config.query: SELECT id, title, status, severity, assignee, updated_at FROM investigations WHERE status NOT IN ('closed', 'resolved') ORDER BY severity DESC, updated_at DESC
config.description: Collect all open investigations and their current status, severity, and assignee for the handoff report

config.additional_instructions: Generate a shift handoff report: summarize all open investigations, pending actions, escalated incidents, and items needing attention for the incoming shift.
config.description: AI-powered executive summary tailored for SOC shift transitions, covering all active work items

data.label: Email Handoff Report to Incoming Shift

config.description: Send the complete shift handoff report to the incoming shift team via email
Post a shift handoff summary to the SOC operations Slack channel for visibility

parameters.note: Shift handoff completed by {{trigger_1.user.name}} at {{trigger_1.timestamp}}. Report distributed to incoming shift and posted to #soc-operations.

config.description: Record that the shift handoff was completed for audit trail purposes
Shift handoff report generated and distributed successfully
